Title: How Pretext is fixing browser layout struggles
Description:
Have you ever watched a browser get stuck on a complex layout? Software engineer Cheng Lou has released Pretext, a high-performance open-source layout engine designed to stop your browser from struggling. By predicting text height and routing lines without expensive DOM reads, Pretext significantly improves rendering speeds. The demos showcase incredible features like accordion height prediction and particle-driven ASCII art. We love seeing the community build tools like this to solve fundamental web performance issues.

#Pretext #WebPerformance #WebLayout
